title: Display Charger IDs On the Map
summary: Use the Map Monitor Quick Select control to display charger IDs on the map so chargers can be identified by their unique IDs.
when_to_use: Use when a support user needs to view charger identifiers on the Map Monitor and confirm which charger is which by its displayed unique ID.
not_for: Do not use this procedure to infer charger status or charger behavior from the ID display alone.

roles_and_responsibilities.responsibility: Open Map Monitor, use the Quick Select charger ID control, and visually identify charger IDs shown on the map.

safety_notes: This source supports displaying charger IDs only.
Do not infer charger status or charger behavior from the ID display alone.
access_or_tools_needed: Access to the Map Monitor screen

access_required: Access to the Map Monitor screen
system_preconditions: Map Monitor is available and openable in the RMS interface.
Quick Select controls are visible on the left-side panel.

visual_references.description: Map Monitor Quick Select panel showing icons including the View Charger IDs control.

steps.title: Open Map Monitor and locate Quick Select
steps.purpose: Position the user at the correct screen and control area used to display charger IDs.
steps.instruction: Open the Map Monitor screen and locate the Quick Select area on the left-side panel.
steps.expected_result: The Map Monitor screen is visible and the Quick Select controls can be seen on the left-side panel.
steps.healthy_condition: The Quick Select panel is visible and includes map display and object-selection icons.
steps.failure_condition: Map Monitor is not accessible or the Quick Select area cannot be located.

actions.label: Locate Quick Select
actions.exact_action: Locate the Quick Select area on the left-side panel.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: The Map Monitor Quick Select panel on the left side, including the charger ID display icon.

stop_or_escalate_if: Escalate if the Map Monitor screen cannot be accessed.
Escalate if the Quick Select controls are not visible.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: Additional icons help users understand paths and inspect map objects; the panel includes path, station ID, charger ID, and object selection icons.

steps.title: Select View Charger IDs
steps.purpose: Enable charger ID labels on the map.
steps.expected_result: The map updates to display charger IDs.
steps.healthy_condition: Charger identifiers appear on the map after the icon is selected.
steps.failure_condition: No charger IDs appear after selecting the icon.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: The Quick Select icon used to display charger IDs.

stop_or_escalate_if: Escalate if charger IDs do not display after selecting the charger ID icon.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: All chargers in the system have unique IDs, and clicking the charger ID icon displays them.

steps.title: Observe displayed charger IDs
steps.purpose: Confirm that charger identifiers are visible on the map for review.
steps.instruction: Observe the map and identify the displayed charger IDs.
steps.expected_result: Charger IDs are visible on the map and can be read by the user.
steps.healthy_condition: Displayed charger IDs are visible for chargers shown on the map.
steps.failure_condition: Charger IDs are not visible or cannot be identified on the map.

actions.label: Observe map labels
actions.exact_action: Observe the map and identify the displayed charger IDs.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Displayed charger ID labels associated with chargers on the map.

stop_or_escalate_if: Escalate if charger IDs do not display after selecting the charger ID icon.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: All chargers in the system have unique IDs, and clicking the charger ID icon displays them.

steps.title: Verify charger IDs are unique
steps.purpose: Use the displayed labels for identification of chargers by their unique IDs.
steps.instruction: Verify that each charger shown on the map has its own unique ID.
steps.expected_result: Each charger shown on the map is identifiable by a unique displayed ID.
steps.healthy_condition: Each charger shown has its own unique ID displayed.
steps.failure_condition: A charger does not show an ID, or the displayed IDs do not support unique identification.

actions.label: Verify uniqueness
actions.exact_action: Verify that each charger shown on the map has its own unique ID.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Charger labels on the map used to distinguish one charger from another.

stop_or_escalate_if: Escalate if charger IDs do not display after selecting the charger ID icon.
Stop if attempting to use the ID display alone to determine charger status or behavior.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: All chargers in the system have unique IDs, and clicking the charger ID icon displays them.

success_criteria: The map displays charger IDs after the View Charger Ids icon is selected.
Chargers shown on the map can be identified by their displayed unique IDs.
healthy_conditions: The Quick Select panel is visible on Map Monitor.
The View Charger Ids control is available.
Charger IDs display on the map.
Each charger shown is identifiable by a unique ID.
failure_conditions: The Map Monitor screen cannot be accessed.
The Quick Select area cannot be located.
Charger IDs do not display after selecting the charger ID icon.
The displayed ID view is used to infer charger status or charger behavior.
escalation_guidance: Escalate if charger IDs do not display after selecting the charger ID icon.
Do not use this procedure alone to determine charger status or charger behavior.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Map Monitor Quick Select panel and the charger ID display icon.

missing_details: The source does not provide a time estimate for this procedure.
The source does not specify whether production stop is required.
The source does not specify whether LOTO is required.
The source does not provide additional troubleshooting steps if charger IDs fail to display.
The source does not define role boundaries beyond support-oriented usage.
